items.text:
I don't carry around a bunch of gold,
like you. Might have bigger muscles if I did.

Might be nice if people listened
when I told them what to do.
So would you take a different path?

Eh? No! Hard to imagine who I'd be
with an emptier head.

Yes, that's unfair, and an insult.
I apologize.

Not empty, just filled with things
that I, personally, would value less.

And come to say,
these past few years,

folk have started heeding what I say,
as my ideas are good --
they recognize.
